summary: Iteration 196: Verified all Barrister View export formatting fixes. All 3 core issues from user complaint have been resolved.
critical_code_review_comments: Fix #1 (TOC Format): VERIFIED - All TOCs use standardized format with gray background (bg-slate-50/80), 'Contents (X Sections)' heading, and 2-column grid layout (grid-cols-2). Confirmed in BarristerView.jsx lines 421-428.

Fix #2 (Word Export Preview Mode): VERIFIED - All Word export buttons now open document-preview page with mode=word instead of downloading .doc file. Tested: Barrister Word (line 732), Word All (line 1218), Progress Word (line 1668).

Fix #3 (Section HTML Rebuild): VERIFIED - Barrister View export now captures section content from data-testid='barrister-section-markdown-{N}' elements (line 643) instead of raw innerHTML. Each section wrapped in .section > .section-header + .section-body structure.

Tailwind Utilities: VERIFIED - ~50 Tailwind utility CSS rules added to export CSS (lines 467-530) including .flex, .items-center, .gap-2, .mb-2, .p-4, .border, .rounded-lg, .font-bold, .text-sm, .text-slate-600, etc.
Code Quality: All 4 files (BarristerView.jsx, ReportView.jsx, CaseDetail.jsx, exportHtml.js) pass ESLint with no errors.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 196 verified 3 Barrister View export fixes: (1) TOC format now uses gray bg, 'Contents (X Sections)' heading, 2-column grid - matching on-screen format. (2) Word export opens document-preview page with mode=word (NOT blob download). (3) Section HTML rebuilt using export CSS classes (.section, .section-header, .section-body) instead of capturing raw innerHTML with Tailwind classes. Test case: R v Homann (case_ba08d8e0ad0d). All exports verified at /document-preview?mode=word and /document-preview?mode=pdf.
